sql: WITH t AS ( SELECT net_sol, entry_drift_pct d, exit_reason, hold_sec, CASE WHEN entry_price_sol>0 AND high_price_sol IS NOT NULL THEN 100.0*(high_price_sol/entry_price_sol-1.0) END mfe FROM copy_trades WHERE strategy_id='copy-fable-freshdip' AND status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL ) SELECT CASE WHEN d < -20 THEN 'a_lt-20' WHEN d < -10 THEN 'b_-20..-10' WHEN d < -5 THEN 'c_-10..-5' WHEN d < -3 THEN 'd_-5..-3' WHEN d < -1 THEN 'e_-3..-1' ELSE 'f_-1..0' END bkt, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(net_sol),3) net, ROUND(AVG(net_sol),4) avg_net, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN net_sol>0 THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END),3) wr, ROUND(AVG(mfe),1) avg_mfe, ROUND(MIN(d),2) min_d, ROUND(MAX(d),2) max_d FROM t GROUP BY bkt ORDER BY bkt
